text.title: Architecture Review Cadence Protocol — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable preconditions to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Mandatory minimum tree for every methodology.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all Applies-If preconditions satisfied AND none of the Skip-If disqualifiers present?

conclusion.verdict: execute the procedure in 04-procedure.xml and commit the artefact
do not apply; route to the upstream / sibling methodology named in AGENTS.md Related
